name: Aurum - Certified Little Guy, Deceptive Pest
description:
“Aww, c’mon! Pick me up, big guy! Pleeease?”

Gay ahh little shapeshifter, prefers to be a tiny dude that can be very easily manhandled. Actual freak.

(Art and character belong to Booneyard !! He’s so cute like genuinely)
